## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md).
- [ ] For spec changes: I have updated the draft spec and (if applicable) examples.
- [ ] For standardization: I have updated the relevant file(s) under `standardization/`.
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) where applicable.
